overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval great hall filled with diners at long feast tables, illuminated by hundreds of candles in hanging chandeliers. The stone Gothic architecture features tall arched windows and a high vaulted ceiling, creating an atmospheric banquet scene reminiscent of a castle or wizarding school.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with banquet tables

agents.ego_description: slowly panning across the great hall, observing the feast and seated diners

entered.detail: ornate iron chandeliers with multiple lit candles hanging in rows from the vaulted ceiling
large Gothic stone archway with carved details framing the far end of the hall
long wooden tables laden with colorful food, plates, and goblets
tall narrow arched window with stone tracery allowing natural light to enter
decorative stone carvings and columns along the side walls

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans across a grand medieval great hall filled with diners seated at long wooden tables laden with food. Hundreds of candles in ornate chandeliers illuminate the stone Gothic architecture, while tall windows provide additional natural light. The atmosphere is warm and bustling with activity as people enjoy the feast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a grand medieval great hall that captures the bustling warmth of a royal feast. It begins by gliding past diners seated at long wooden tables laden with food, where the flickering light of hundreds of candles in ornate chandeliers casts a glow over the stone Gothic architecture. As the camera continues its movement, the view expands to reveal the scale of the room, blending the warm interior light with natural illumination streaming through tall arched windows. The scene finally settles on the high vaulted ceilings and the lively activity of the banquet, emphasizing the atmospheric depth of the castle interior.
